SEARCH
Package bupt.ta.service

Class StudentNotificationService

java.lang.Object
bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService
public class StudentNotificationService extends Object
Creates in-app notifications for TA applicants when application state changes. Comments describe intent for each SiteNotification.getKind() value.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    KIND_APPLICATION_SUBMITTED
    SiteNotification.getKind() for a new submission.
    static final String
    KIND_AUTO_CLOSED
    Application auto-closed due to workload cap.
    static final String
    KIND_AUTO_PROMOTED
    Promoted from waitlist to selected.
    static final String
    KIND_INTERVIEW_DETAILS
    Interview time/location details sent.
    static final String
    KIND_STATUS_INTERVIEW
    Applicant moved to interview stage.
    static final String
    KIND_STATUS_REJECTED
    Applicant not selected.
    static final String
    KIND_STATUS_SELECTED
    Applicant selected for the role.
    static final String
    KIND_STATUS_WAITLIST
    Applicant placed on waitlist.
    static final String
    KIND_WITHDRAWN
    Applicant withdrew.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    notifyApplicationSubmitted(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that an application was submitted.
    static void
    notifyAutoClosed(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String note)
    Notifies the applicant that a pending application was auto-closed (workload cap).
    static void
    notifyAutoPromotedFromWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they were promoted from the waitlist to selected.
    static void
    notifyInterviewDetails(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant of interview time, location, and assessment notes.
    static void
    notifyInterviewInvite(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that their application moved to the interview stage.
    static void
    notifyRejected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String moNotes)
    Notifies the applicant that they were not selected.
    static void
    notifySelected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they were selected for the role.
    static void
    notifyWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they are on the waitlist.
    static void
    notifyWithdrawn(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
    Notifies the applicant that they withdrew an application.

  • Constructor Details

    • StudentNotificationService

      public StudentNotificationService()

  • Method Details

    • notifyApplicationSubmitted

      public static void notifyApplicationSubmitted(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job) throws IOException
      Notifies the applicant that an application was submitted.
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      app - application record
      job - job posting (may be null)
      Throws:
      IOException - if notification persistence fails

    • notifyInterviewInvite

      public static void notifyInterviewInvite(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job) throws IOException
      Notifies the applicant that their application moved to the interview stage.
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      app - application record
      job - job posting (may be null)
      Throws:
      IOException - if notification persistence fails

    • notifyWaitlist

      public static void notifyWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job) throws IOException
      Notifies the applicant that they are on the waitlist.
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      app - application record
      job - job posting (may be null)
      Throws:
      IOException - if notification persistence fails

    • notifySelected

      public static void notifySelected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job) throws IOException
      Notifies the applicant that they were selected for the role.
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      app - application record
      job - job posting (may be null)
      Throws:
      IOException - if notification persistence fails

    • notifyRejected

      public static void notifyRejected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String moNotes) throws IOException
      Notifies the applicant that they were not selected.
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      app - application record
      job - job posting (may be null)
      moNotes - optional organiser message included in the body
      Throws:
      IOException - if notification persistence fails

    • notifyInterviewDetails

      public static void notifyInterviewDetails(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job) throws IOException
      Notifies the applicant of interview time, location, and assessment notes.
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      app - application record (carries interview fields)
      job - job posting (may be null)
      Throws:
      IOException - if notification persistence fails

    • notifyAutoClosed

      public static void notifyAutoClosed(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, String note) throws IOException
      Notifies the applicant that a pending application was auto-closed (workload cap).
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      app - application record
      job - job posting (may be null)
      note - optional system note appended to the body
      Throws:
      IOException - if notification persistence fails

    • notifyWithdrawn

      public static void notifyWithdrawn(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job) throws IOException
      Notifies the applicant that they withdrew an application.
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      app - application record
      job - job posting (may be null)
      Throws:
      IOException - if notification persistence fails

    • notifyAutoPromotedFromWaitlist

      public static void notifyAutoPromotedFromWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job) throws IOException
      Notifies the applicant that they were promoted from the waitlist to selected.
      Parameters:
      storage - persistence
      app - application record
      job - job posting (may be null)
      Throws:
      IOException - if notification persistence fails
